name: Potato Chips
recipeIngredient: 20 ounces Idaho or russet potatoes, scrubbed
Freshly ground black pepper -- to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place oven rack in center of oven. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Slice potatoes exactly 1/8 inch thick and arrange directly onto oven rack in a single layer.
3. Bake until golden brown and crispy, about 8-10 minutes.
4. Place in serving bowl and sprinkle lightly with vinegar, salt, and pepper.
Per serving (1/2 cup): 115 calories, 0 g fat.
Adapted from "The Little Book of Leftovers; 50 Innovative Ways to
Eat Last Night's Dinner Tonight" by Kevin Crafts.
